comment: PDVD single-p.e. response templates (ADC, 16 ns ticks, peak at sample 10) and the DAPHNE OpChannel -> template map for Flash::OpDecon.  Data-driven per-channel templates from the run-39252 harvest (spe_build.py: 1-PE averages; cathode tails exp-repaired, no AC undershoot); channels named *_popavg carry the population-average fallback scaled to the channel 1-PE mode.  See pdvd/docs/pdvd-spe-template.md.
